mapper.sql: a.task_id, a.task_type, a.title, a.content, a.res_com_id, a.file_out_type, a.file_out, a.task_dealine_time, a.send_type, a.send_obj_id, a.deal_type, a.deal_obj_id, a.deal_desc, a.session_id, a.ori_task_id, a.message_id, a.message_step_code, a.status_cd, a.p_task_id, a.task_ext_id, a.priority, a.page_id, a.system_no, a.load_sso_iframe_url, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.com_acct_id, a.resource_biz_type, a.resource_id
mapper.select: select distinct from men_task a inner join men_res_com b on a.res_com_id = b.res_com_id where b.res_page like concat('%', 'resourceId', '%') and b.res_page like concat('%', #{resourceId}, '%') order by a.create_time desc

select distinct from men_task a inner join men_res_com b on a.res_com_id = b.res_com_id where b.res_page like concat('%', 'resourceId', '%') and b.res_page like concat('%', #{resourceId}, '%')
and a.status_cd in
#{statusCode}
order by a.create_time desc

select from men_task a
and a.res_com_id = #{resComId}
